items.operation: Add/replace PHASE54 with Kapsam / Amaç / Sonuç only.
items.rule: No alt-basamak dump, no JSON/head/push log, no key=value pile.

items.operation: Add PHASE54A-E chronicle with alt basamak, audit, result and authority boundary.
items.rule: Detailed history allowed, but readable; no raw dump blocks.

items.operation: Bind Readonly Decision Surface and Evidence Bridge into architecture map.
items.rule: Show relation: Intelligence Officer Runtime -> Consumer/Readmodel Contract -> Readonly Decision Surface -> Risk Engine final gate.

items.operation: Update current canonical state after PHASE54 binding apply.
items.rule: Keep concise current state, head, last completed, next safe step.

items.operation: Update continuation handoff after PHASE54 binding apply.
items.rule: New chat must know PHASE54 canonical status and next phase.

value.title: PHASE54 - READONLY DECISION SURFACE AND EVIDENCE BRIDGE
value.kapsam: Evidence, intelligence, threat memory, outcome memory, decision memory, fusion summary, risk gate ve tactical context çıktılarının observe-only karar yüzeyine bağlanması.
value.amac: Kullanıcıya hangi token, neden, hangi kanıtla, hangi riskle, hangi engelle ve hangi readonly SL/TP bağlamıyla izlenebileceğini tek karar yüzeyinde göstermek.
value.sonuc: Readonly decision surface contract, TempDB dry-run ve post-audit doğrulandı. Hard block bypass edilmedi; social/news tek başına karar üretmedi; SL/TP olmadan entry bağlamı tamamlanmadı; manual approval execution authority olmadı.
